summary: Agent-readiness needs focused work before agents can reliably use this project.
recommendations: Add or document setup, test, lint, and typecheck commands.
Improve README and docs so agents can find quickstart, install, and examples.
Add task benchmarks for the top developer workflows agents should complete.
Document secret-handling and privacy rules for agent workflows.

findings.title: Missing AGENTS.md
findings.description: The repo has no AGENTS.md, so coding agents lack a stable project guide.
evidence: AGENTS.md was not found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Create AGENTS.md with setup, tests, architecture, conventions, and safety rules.

findings.title: Missing CLAUDE.md
findings.description: Claude Code users do not have a concise project memory file.
evidence: CLAUDE.md was not found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Add CLAUDE.md with concise workflow, boundaries, and testing expectations.

findings.title: README.md exists, but does not include clear test command
findings.description: A detected agent-facing artifact is missing specific guidance agents need for reliable work.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: test, pnpm test, npm test, pytest, cargo test, go test.
findings.recommendation: Add clear test command to README.md.

findings.title: README.md exists, but does not include architecture or repo map
findings.description: A detected agent-facing artifact is missing specific guidance agents need for reliable work.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: architecture, repo structure, packages/, apps/, src/.
findings.recommendation: Add architecture or repo map to README.md.

findings.title: Missing llms.txt
findings.description: The project does not expose a compact, machine-readable map for LLMs and agents.
evidence: llms.txt was not found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Create llms.txt with links to README, docs, architecture, examples, and API references.

findings.title: README.md has no quickstart section
findings.description: The README is missing a section agents commonly need to orient themselves.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: quickstart, quick start, getting started.
findings.recommendation: Add a quickstart that gets a new user to a working command quickly.

findings.title: README.md has no installation instructions
findings.description: The README is missing a section agents commonly need to orient themselves.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: install, pnpm, npm, yarn, pip.

findings.title: README.md has no examples
findings.description: The README is missing a section agents commonly need to orient themselves.
evidence: README.md does not contain any of: example, usage, demo.
findings.recommendation: Add concrete examples showing expected usage and output.

findings.title: Docs exist but no Markdown files are discoverable
findings.description: Agents work best when documentation source is available in text formats.
evidence: docs/ exists but no .md or .mdx files were scanned.
findings.recommendation: Add Markdown documentation or ensure docs source is not ignored.

findings.title: package.json has no scripts
findings.description: Agents cannot discover standard local workflows from package.json.
evidence: package.json scripts object is empty.
findings.recommendation: Add scripts for test, lint, typecheck, build, and local development.

findings.title: No test script in package.json
findings.description: Agents cannot reliably run test without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "test".
findings.recommendation: Add a package.json "test" script or document the equivalent command clearly.

findings.title: No lint script in package.json
findings.description: Agents cannot reliably run lint without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "lint".
findings.recommendation: Add a package.json "lint" script or document the equivalent command clearly.

findings.title: No typecheck script in package.json
findings.description: Agents cannot reliably run typecheck without a package script.
evidence: package.json scripts does not include "typecheck".
findings.recommendation: Add a package.json "typecheck" script or document the equivalent command clearly.

findings.title: OpenAPI file not detected
findings.description: No OpenAPI schema was found. This may be fine for projects without an HTTP API.
evidence: No openapi.* or swagger.* file was scanned.
findings.recommendation: For API products, publish an OpenAPI spec with operation descriptions and examples.

findings.title: MCP readiness could not be evaluated yet
findings.description: No MCP server/config/package signal was detected.
evidence: No file or package name matching MCP was scanned.
findings.recommendation: If this project exposes MCP tools, include server files and clear tool descriptions.

findings.title: Missing agent task benchmark file
findings.description: The project has no task benchmark describing realistic agent workflows.
evidence: No benchmarks/agent-tasks.yaml or .agentlighthouse/tasks.yaml file was found.
findings.recommendation: Add a benchmark file with tasks such as install, run tests, add a small feature, and find core modules.

findings.title: Missing .agentlighthouseignore
findings.description: Scans should explicitly exclude generated, private, and secret-bearing paths.
evidence: .agentlighthouseignore was not found at the repository root.
findings.recommendation: Add .agentlighthouseignore with node_modules, build outputs, env files, secrets, and vendor paths.

findings.title: Instructions do not tell agents how to handle secrets
findings.description: Agent-facing instructions should state how to avoid exposing secrets or private data.
evidence: No secret/privacy guidance was detected in AGENTS.md.
findings.recommendation: Add a security section explaining secret handling and external LLM constraints.

findings.title: Docs contain TODO/deprecated-looking terms without migration guidance
findings.description: Stale markers can confuse agents unless they include replacement guidance.
evidence: README.md:3: Coming soon.
README.md:5: TODO old setup.
findings.recommendation: Resolve TODOs or add explicit migration/replacement guidance.
